## Generation Flow

```
Natural Language Description
    ↓ RTL-Gen AI (LLM generation)
Verilog RTL
    ↓ Yosys (logic synthesis)
Gate-level Netlist
    ↓ OpenROAD (floorplan → placement → CTS → routing)
Routed DEF
    ↓ Magic VLSI (GDS export)
GDSII  ←  This package
```
